grid_system.library_view: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 xl:grid-cols-8 gap-6

MovieCard.style: relative group overflow-hidden rounded-lg bg-card border border-border/50 transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_-10px_rgba(225,29,72,0.3)]
MovieCard.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity flex items-center justify-center gap-4 backdrop-blur-sm

Sidebar.style: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full bg-background/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-r border-border z-50 flex flex-col py-8

Modal.content: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-border shadow-2xl max-w-5xl w-full rounded-xl overflow-hidden

Buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_20px_-5px_rgba(225,29,72,0.5)] rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-semibold tracking-wide transition-all hover:scale-105
Buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium transition-all

universal_guidelines: Use 'Outfit' for all headings to give a premium, modern feel.
Backgrounds must be #050505 (Obsidian), never pure black #000000.
Primary color #E11D48 is for high-priority actions only (Play, Add).
Use 2/3 aspect ratio for all movie posters.
Implement 'framer-motion' for smooth layout changes when filtering.
All interactive elements must have a `data-testid`.
Do not use gradients for text.
Ensure high contrast for text (APCA standards).
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install 'lucide-react', 'framer-motion', 'clsx', 'tailwind-merge' if missing. 2. Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the custom colors defined in 'colors.palette'. 3. Create a 'Layout' component that includes the Sidebar and main content area. 4. Build the 'MovieCard' component with the specified hover effects. 5. Use the 'empty_state_bg' image for the 'No Directories' view.
